sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79478" key="parere/ttw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρερέττω</orth>, <sense id="n79478.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">move as with oars</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ σῶμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.71</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
